title: Studio Ghibli AI Trend in 45 Seconds! #Shorts
description:
Everyone is turning their selfies into dreamy Ghibli-style art right now, and it’s everywhere! 🌿✨

Today I’m reacting to the viral AI anime portrait trend and why people can’t stop sharing those soft skies, cozy colors, and magical vibes. It’s cute, nostalgic, and honestly super aesthetic—but would you try it for your profile pic? 💙

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✨ LIKE & SUBSCRIBE for daily VTuber content!
🔔 Turn on notifications!
💬 Comment below!
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

#Shorts #VTuber #Anime #Miku #HatsuneMiku #Ghibli #StudioGhibli #AIArt #AnimeArt #ViralTrend #Trending #YouTubeShorts #Kawaii #Otaku #DigitalArt #AnimeGirl #Aesthetic #Japan #ArtTrend #VtuberEN
script: Hiiiii! Miku here! 💙 Okay, today’s internet obsession? Turning your photos into Studio Ghibli-style art with AI! Suddenly everyone has soft watercolor skies, cozy little towns, and that magical main-character energy. It’s super pretty, super nostalgic, and totally taking over my feed! But also—why does every AI version look like you’re about to discover a floating castle or befriend a forest spirit? I kind of love it! If you could Ghibli-fy one photo, would you pick a selfie, your pet, or your whole friend group? Tell me in the comments, and don’t forget to like and subscribe for more cute trending anime vibes! Bye-bye!
